candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line matching cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents, closing balance
candidates.why: Cash flow closing balance mirrors balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as required.

candidates.why: Best match for total current liabilities; 'short-term liabilities' is the IFRS-style current liabilities total.
Cash flow change line is not a balance-sheet stock and thus not appropriate for LCT.

variables.notes: Chose the current-liabilities total reported as 'Total short-term liabilities'.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Clean current portion of debt and explicitly excludes capitalized leases, which matches the baseline STD definition well.
Also represents current maturities of long-term debt, but may overlap with the cleaner excluding-leases total.
Could capture current debt, but may overlap with current portion of long-term debt if both are selected.
A short-term borrowing component, useful only if no clean total exists.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Preferred the clean non-lease current debt line and avoided adding overlapping debt components.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet label for taxes payable/current tax liabilities; appears in the current liabilities section.
Deferred taxes are noncurrent/temporary-difference items, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed; selected 'Tax Liabilities' because it is the only semantically appropriate payable tax liability line and is listed among current liabilities.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet PPE-type asset line; a tangible fixed asset and preferable to cash-flow activity lines.
Large real-estate asset line, but investment property is usually separate from PPE under IFRS and thus less preferred for PPEGT.
Tangible asset but lease-related and not baseline PPE.
Candidate label appears blank and unclear/supplemental, less reliable than the reported asset line.

variables.notes: PPE is not reported as a clean total. 'Equipment' is the best tangible fixed-asset proxy, but this is somewhat ambiguous because the company mainly reports 'Investment properties' separately under IFRS.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct net cash flow from operating activities line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Used the final operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
